assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 9-15 of staleness-check.md show the HTML comment '<!-- Last-Updated: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z -->' is read and explicitly parsed: 'Parsed ISO 8601 value: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z'.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 19-23 show Age: 61 days, Threshold: 14 days (default), Result: STALE. Lines 25-47 display staleness warnings for streams 2.1.x and 2.2.x with the warning text 'The matrix may not reflect recent releases.'

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 27-28: 'Security matrix for stream **2.1.x** was last updated on 2026-05-01 (61 days ago).' and lines 39-40 for stream 2.2.x. All three elements (stream name, last-updated date, days since update) are present in both warnings.

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 30-33: '1. Refresh now -- re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', '2. Proceed anyway -- continue triage with the current matrix', '3. Stop -- halt triage so I can investigate'. All three options are present and the refresh option explicitly references setup Step 10.6.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 1-5: 'Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization). No Jira API calls or MCP operations have been attempted at this point.' The step sequencing table (lines 51-57) shows Step 0.5 as 'Not started -- waiting for Step 0.3 to complete'. Line 60 confirms 'No Jira operations (MCP calls, REST API calls, JQL searches, issue fetches) have been attempted.'
